"[3mWe leverage creator rizz to unlock authentic engagement.[0m"

Problem:
'leverage' as a verb reads corporate.

Suggestion:
[38;5;42mUse 'use'.[0m

[38;5;240msuppress.input.txt[0m:1:1  [38;5;63mcorporate/construction-unlock-abstract[0m  [1;38;5;196mwarning[0m  weight 5
"[3mWe leverage creator rizz to unlock authentic engagement.[0m"

Problem:
This uses a vague 'unlock + abstract noun' construction.

Suggestion:
[38;5;42mSay what becomes possible.[0m

[38;5;240msuppress.input.txt[0m:3:1  [38;5;63mcorporate/verb-leverage[0m  [1;38;5;196mwarning[0m  weight 4
"[3m<!-- unc-disable-next-line corporate/verb-leverage -->[0m
[3mWe leverage the new feature.[0m                          "

Problem:
'leverage' as a verb reads corporate.

Suggestion:
[38;5;42mUse 'use'.[0m

Result: [1;38;5;196mFAIL[0m
